zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Berkeley於1352年1月23日出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾沃頓 武安德 艾其時，他的父親Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston59歲，母親Katherine de Clevedon46歲。他於1371年與Elizabeth de Betteshorne在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1410年被列為high sheriff of wiltshire。他去世於1428年3月5日在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Berkeley于1352年1月23日出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾沃頓 武安德 艾其时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston59岁，母亲Katherine de Clevedon46岁。他于1371年与Elizabeth de Betteshorne在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1410年被列为high sheriff of wiltshire。他去世于1428年3月5日在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Berkeley was born on 23 January 1352, in Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston, was 59 and his mother, Katherine de Clevedon, was 46. He married Elizabeth de Betteshorne in 1371, in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. In 1410, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of wiltshire. He died on 5 March 1428, in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Berkeley est né le 23 janvier 1352, à Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Clevedon, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Betteshorne en 1371, à Beverston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. En 1410, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of wiltshire. Il est décédé le 5 mars 1428, à Beverston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Berkeley am 23. Januar 1352 in Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston 59 und seine Mutter Katherine de Clevedon 46. Er hat 1371 in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth de Betteshorne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1410 ist sein Beruf als high sheriff of wiltshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 5. März 1428 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Berkeley è nato il il 23 gennaio 1352 nel Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston, aveva 59 anni e il suo madre, Katherine de Clevedon, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Betteshorne nel 1371, nel Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1410, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of wiltshire. Morì il 5 marzo 1428, nel Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Berkeleyが1352年1月23日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウオットオン ウンダー エッジで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Costonは59歳，母Katherine de Clevedonは46歳であった。1371年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアベバーストンでElizabeth de Betteshorneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1410年，職業はhigh sheriff of wiltshireと記録されている。彼は1428年3月5日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアベバーストンで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Berkeley(이)가 1352년 1월 23일 영국 그루스스터실르 보턴 운더 에지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston(은)는 59세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine de Clevedon(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1371년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 비버스턴에서 Elizabeth de Betteshorne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1410년, 그의 직업은 high sheriff of wiltshire이었다. 그는 1428년 3월 5일 영국 그루스스터실르 비버스턴에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.23 January 1352–5 March 1428: 23 de janeiro de 1352–5 de março de 1428
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Berkeley nasceu em 23 de janeiro de 1352, em Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Clevedon, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Betteshorne em 1371, em Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1410, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of wiltshire. Ele faleceu em 5 de março de 1428, em Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Berkeley родился 23 января 1352 г. в местности воттон ундир эдж, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Clevedon, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Betteshorne в 1371 г. в местности бивирстон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. В 1410 году он работал по профессии high sheriff of wiltshire. Он умер 5 марта 1428 г. в местности бивирстон, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.

sm.from 1410 to 1411: mai le 1410 e o'o I le 1411

es.23 January 1352–5 March 1428: 23 de enero de 1352–5 de marzo de 1428
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Berkeley nació el 23 de enero de 1352, en Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Katherine de Clevedon, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Betteshorne en 1371, en Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1410, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of wiltshire. Murió el 5 de marzo de 1428, en Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años.
